compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## Why
The plan-review claim gate consumes the SIGNED attestation `rebar review-plan` produces on a non-blocking PASS. An agent that hand-optimizes away the signing (or defers it to a guessed 'final round') can leave tickets without the attestation the claim gate needs. Local guidance was added to CLAUDE.local.md; this shares the same positive framing with all contributors via the committed CLAUDE.md.

## What
Append to the Plan-review protocol in CLAUDE.md a positive instruction: run `rebar review-plan <id>` as documented so it signs on every non-blocking PASS; sign on every round (signing is free; the last round is not knowable; remediation harmlessly staleness-invalidates the prior attestation on read).

## Scope
Docs only (CLAUDE.md). Positive framing — avoids priming the anti-pattern by naming it.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Plan-review protocol states plan review signs an attestation on every non-blocking PASS and to sign on every round.
- [ ] Framed as a positive instruction (does not tell agents which flag NOT to use).
- [ ] make lint / pre-commit pass; lands on main via Gerrit (Verified +1).
compiled_state.title: Add plan-review always-signs guidance to committed CLAUDE.md (positive framing)
